elements.original_description: A cartoon thermometer with a red mercury line, a band-aid, and a pill bottle arranged diagonally on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a cartoon thermometer with a red mercury line, a band-aid, and a pill bottle arranged diagonally on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, cartoon style, playful and approachable aesthetic, items distinct and clearly separated, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
